title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 28 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 28 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 28 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/09/2023
DCE iron ore futures continued to ﬂuctuate in a day, the main contract I2401 closed 852, an increase of 0.89%throughout the day. Traders ship according to the market, and there is no purchasing demand after the steel factory restocking ends. PBF at Shandong port dealt 941 yuan/mt; increased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday.
